question: Calculate the total circulating supply of 'BNB' tokens (in units divided by 10^18) by summing balances of all non-zero addresses, where each address’s balance equals its total received BNB minus sent BNB. Exclude transactions involving the zero address (0x000...) for both senders and receivers.
temp_SQL: SELECT SUM(balance) / 1000000000000000000 AS total_circulating_supply FROM (SELECT r."to_address", COALESCE(r."total_received", 0) - COALESCE(s."total_sent", 0) AS balance FROM (SELECT "to_address", SUM("value"::NUMERIC) AS "total_received" FROM "TOKEN_TRANSFERS" WHERE "from_address" != '0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000' AND "to_address" != '0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000' GROUP BY "to_address") r LEFT JOIN (SELECT "from_address", SUM("value"::NUMERIC) AS "total_sent" FROM "TOKEN_TRANSFERS" WHERE "from_address" != '0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000' AND "to_address" != '0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000' GROUP BY "from_address") s ON r."to_address" = s."from_address" WHERE (COALESCE(r."total_received", 0) - COALESCE(s."total_sent", 0)) > 0);
final_SQL: SELECT SUM(balance) / 1000000000000000000 AS total_circulating_supply FROM (SELECT r."to_address", COALESCE(r."total_received", 0) - COALESCE(s."total_sent", 0) AS balance FROM (SELECT "to_address", SUM("value"::NUMERIC) AS "total_received" FROM "TOKEN_TRANSFERS" WHERE "from_address" != '0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000' AND "to_address" != '0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000' GROUP BY "to_address") r LEFT JOIN (SELECT "from_address", SUM("value"::NUMERIC) AS "total_sent" FROM "TOKEN_TRANSFERS" WHERE "from_address" != '0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000' AND "to_address" != '0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000' GROUP BY "from_address") s ON r."to_address" = s."from_address" WHERE (COALESCE(r."total_received", 0) - COALESCE(s."total_sent", 0)) > 0);
